s-1.ptxt: INSPECT FRONT AIRBAG SENSOR (VEHICLE NOT INVOLVED IN COLLISION)

s2.ptxt: Perform a diagnostic system check (See page ).

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT FRONT AIRBAG SENSOR (VEHICLE INVOLVED IN COLLISION AND AIRBAG HAS NOT DEPLOYED)

s2.ptxt: Perform a diagnostic system check (See page ).

When the front bumper of the vehicle or its area is damaged, check if there is any damage to the front airbag sensor. If there are any defects as mentioned below, replace the front airbag sensor with a new one:

item.ptxt: Cracks, dents or chips on the sensor housing.
Cracks or other damage to the connector.
Peeling off of the label or damage to the serial number.

atten2.ptxt: Be sure to follow the correct removal and installation procedures.

s-1.ptxt: INSPECT FRONT AIRBAG SENSOR (VEHICLE INVOLVED IN COLLISION AND AIRBAG IS DEPLOYED)

atten2.ptxt: Be sure to follow the correct removal and installation procedures.

atten4.ptxt: The front airbag sensor on the impacted side should be replaced after the steering pad, front passenger airbag assembly or driver side knee airbag assembly has deployed.
